body_txt: When used in an actual broadcast, this tends to go best when said host is schooled enough in Self-Deprecation to realize that he comes off as this, and uses it to make more jokes, in which case he's often a Jerk with a Heart of Gold . Has quite a lot in common with, but is usually more influential than, the Lounge Lizard . Often goes hand in hand with Delusions of Local Grandeur , newsreaders believe they are local celebrities due to their jobs.
